nasb.text: Is there iniquity in Gilead? Surely they are worthless. In Gilgal they sacrifice bulls, Yes, their altars are like the stone heaps Beside the furrows of the field.

esv.text: If there is iniquity in Gilead, they shall surely come to nothing: in Gilgal they sacrifice bulls; their altars also are like stone heaps on the furrows of the field.

cnv.text: 在基列仍有罪孽， 他們實在是沒有價值的。 他們在吉甲獻牛犢為祭， 他們的祭壇好像田間犁溝中的石堆。”

ccb.text: 基列人充满罪恶，终必灭亡。 他们在吉甲用公牛献祭， 他们的祭坛像田间犁沟里的石堆。
